tasks.description: Define the primary strengths and weaknesses of the portfolio based on previous analysis.

subtasks.description: Summarize tickers/allocations to keep (strengths with strong outlook, risk adjust returns).
List tickers/allocations to drop or reduce (weaknesses, poor outlook).

tasks.description: Screen for new high-quality, low-correlation stocks and ETFs to upgrade/rebalance the portfolio.

subtasks.description: Use stock_screener to target high risk-adjusted return, low beta equities in relevant industries.
Repeat stock_screener with ETF-centric constraints to ensure ETF coverage.
Use stock_screener with new constraints or filters at least a third time to diversify search for replacements.

tasks.description: Construct the new optimized portfolio and log it.

subtasks.description: Propose allocations to retained, new, and adjusted positions based on strengths/weaknesses analysis and screening results.
Log new/optimized portfolio and justification in episodic memory via episodic_remember.

tasks.description: Compute analytics on the newly constructed portfolio to evaluate improvement.

subtasks.description: Call calculate_portfolio_performance, calculate_portfolio_returns_metrics, and calculate_portfolio_beta_vs_index with updated portfolio_dict to analyze performance, returns, and beta.
Run calculate_portfolio_correlation_matrix and portfolio_stress_test on the new portfolio for a complete risk/correlation and stress check.

tasks.description: Iteratively refine and re-analyze the new portfolio, making incremental improvements as necessary.

subtasks.description: Evaluate results; if not meeting objectives, adjust allocations or substitute holdings and repeat analytics as above.

tasks.description: Format and output the final optimized portfolio in strict JSON format, including all changes (added, removed, adjusted).

subtasks.description: Structure and format the final output per specified requirements, ensuring all portfolio changes are clear and compliant.
